prompt: I want to build a simple CNN classifier in Rust using Burn for the CIFAR-10 dataset. Write a complete setup: Cargo.toml, model.rs with a conv+linear stack, and a main.rs that initializes the model on WGPU. Use the current Burn 0.21 API — I don't want the old B: Backend generic style.
assertions: Cargo.toml includes burn with features wgpu, train, vision
Model struct uses #[derive(Module, Debug)] without B: Backend generic
No Tensor<B, D> style — uses Tensor<D> without backend generic
